description: Benchmark tests for workflow-runner skill - Lightweight Ten-Step Cycle orchestrator

baseline_comparison.description: Human manually coordinates which phases and skills to run in sequence

evals.name: full-cycle-execution
evals.prompt: Run a full Ten-Step Cycle for a new feature task: 'Add user profile editing functionality'. Execute all phases A through D.

assertions.name: executes_phase_a
assertions.description: Should execute all Phase A steps (A.0, A.1, A.2, A.3)

assertions.name: executes_phase_b
assertions.description: Should execute Phase B steps (B.1, B.2)

assertions.name: executes_phase_c
assertions.description: Should execute Phase C steps (C.1, C.2)

assertions.name: executes_phase_d
assertions.description: Should execute Phase D steps (D.1, D.2)

assertions.name: correct_order
assertions.description: Phases must execute in A→B→C→D order
assertions.check: output.indexOf('A.0') < output.indexOf('B.1') && output.indexOf('B.1') < output.indexOf('C.1') && output.indexOf('C.1') < output.indexOf('D.1')

evals.name: partial-cycle-ab
evals.prompt: Run only Phase A + Phase B for task: 'Fix pagination bug on product list'. Skip Phase C and D as this is a small fix that will be committed manually.

setup.task: Fix pagination bug on product list

assertions.name: executes_phase_a
assertions.description: Should execute Phase A steps

assertions.name: executes_phase_b
assertions.description: Should execute Phase B steps

assertions.name: skips_phase_c_and_d
assertions.description: Should NOT execute Phase C or D steps

assertions.name: acknowledges_partial_run
assertions.description: Should indicate this is a partial cycle run

evals.name: preset-workflow-feature
evals.prompt: Use the 'new-feature' preset workflow to set up for developing a new push notification feature.

assertions.name: recognizes_preset
assertions.description: Should recognize and load the 'new-feature' preset

assertions.name: includes_spec_phase
assertions.description: new-feature preset must include spec creation (A.1)

assertions.name: includes_branch_creation
assertions.description: new-feature preset must include branch creation (B.1)

assertions.name: includes_merge_step
assertions.description: new-feature preset must include merge to main (C.2)

evals.name: preset-workflow-bugfix
evals.prompt: Use the 'bugfix' preset workflow for: 'Fix null pointer exception in order processing service'.

setup.task: Fix null pointer exception in order processing service

assertions.name: recognizes_bugfix_preset
assertions.description: Should recognize and load the 'bugfix' preset

assertions.name: skips_phase_a
assertions.description: bugfix preset should skip Phase A (no spec needed for bug fixes)

assertions.name: executes_phase_b
assertions.description: Should execute Phase B (branch + implement + fix)

assertions.name: executes_phase_c
assertions.description: Should execute Phase C (commit + merge)

evals.name: phase-skip-logic
evals.prompt: Run the workflow for a feature task but skip Phase A because state-scanner already confirmed project state is current and an OpenSpec already exists (state: A.3 completed).

assertions.name: detects_phase_a_completed
assertions.description: Should detect that Phase A is already completed

assertions.name: skips_phase_a
assertions.description: Should skip Phase A and start from Phase B

assertions.name: starts_from_phase_b
assertions.description: Should start execution from Phase B.1

assertions.name: explains_skip_reason
assertions.description: Should explain why Phase A was skipped
